titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 69: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 69. (A.R. No. 177 of 1907.) TIRUPPALĀTTUṞAI, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, central shrine, Ādimūlēśvara temple.

p.hi: Year 9, Mithuna, Saturday, Chittirai = 979 A.D. June 7.

summary.p: Records that peruṅguṟi-sabhā of Śrī-Uttamaśīlich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam on the southern bank (of the river Kāvēri) met at Dayāparaṉambalam and carried out the following transaction. The sabhā received 4 chey of land, alongwith two kaḻañju of gold as tax-vigil deposit from Mūrtti Māṉavīraṉ, a native of Pirammil in Paṭṭiṉak-kūṟṟam, which he had purchased from Kaviśiyaṉ Saḍaiyaṉ bhaṭṭaṉ of Tiruviḻimiḻalai and gave in exchange half-a-mā of residential land under the term aṟudi parivarttanai to that person (Mūrtti Mānavīraṉ). They also undertook to carry out the various services to god Sūryadēvar consecrated by him. The land concerned (half-a-mā) was freed from iṟai (land tax) by him for carrying out the services to god Sūryadēvar.
Published in S.I.I. Vol. XIX No. 222.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecariparmmarkku yāṇṭu 9Āvatu tenkarai brahmadeyam śrī Utta
maciliccaturvvetimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟisabhaiyom Ivāṭṭai mithuṉanāyaṟṟuc caṉi
kkiḻamai peṟṟa cittirai nāṉṟu dayāaāpara ṉampalatte sabhaiyom kūṭi I
runtu paṭṭiṉakkūṟṟattup pirammiluṭaiyāṉ murtti māṉaviraṉoṭu sa
bhaiyom parivarttaṉaiceyta paricāvatu Ivvuttamacilic caturvvetima
ṅkalattu vaṭakuṟai viraśrīkāmukavatikku merkku Uttamacilivāykkālukku va
ṭakku kiḻakku niṉṟu 4 kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu viravalli colaippirāṉ kramavitta
ṉuḷḷiṭṭa catukkattārkkuṭpaṭṭa Aiñcām pāṭakam Iraṇṭumāvil vaṭakkaṭaiya tirumiḻa
lai kaviciyaṉ caṭaiyaṉ [ bhaṭ] ṭaṉ pakkal Ivaṉ vilai koṇṭu Uṭaiya nilam 4 cce
yyum sabhaiyommiṭai viḷākattukku Āka Aṟutipparivarttaṉaiyāl koṇṭu Inila
m Iṟaikāvalukku Āka Iru kaḻañcu poṉ Ivaṉ pakkal sabhaiyom koṇṭu Ipparicu
Iṟai Iḻiyttu Ivaṉitāyirunta Inilam 4 māvum Aṟuti parivattaṉaiyāṟ koṇṭu Itaṟ
kku talaimāṟu Āka mūrtti māṉaviraṉukku Aṟutiparivarttaṉaiyāl kuṭutta nilamāvatu śrīkāmu
kavatikku merkku Āticcavāykkālukku vaṭakku kiḻakku niṉṟu nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟuteṉ māmaṭaivi
ḷākamāy kuṭi Irukkiṟa nilam Araimāvum Aṟutipparivarttaṉaiyāl kuṭuttu Inilam tiruppāṟṟuṟai
Ivaṉ ṉeḻuntaruḷuvitta suryadevarkku Oru nāḻi Ariciyāl loru tiruvamitukkum kaṟiya
mutukkum muṉṟu sandhiyum tiruvārātiṉai ceyuntaṉaip potaikku Iraṇṭu tiruviḷak
kukkum Āka Aṟutipparivarttaṉaiyāl kuṭuttu Ipparitu Aṟutip parivarttaṉaiyolai
ceytu kuṭuttom peruṅkuṟisabhaiyom Itu Iṟai kāṭṭiṉāraiyum
Iṟaikāṭṭap paṇiccāraiyum kaṇakkar Iṟai kāṭṭa yaṉṟupatu poṉ ḻutuṟa panmāheśvarararey kuṭuttom peruṅkuṟisabhaiyom Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 69 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
